description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.7 to 3.11 and pypy-3.7 to pypy-3.10). For each job, check out the code, set up the specified Python version, install build tools with pip, run tests with tox, and optionally install Scipy prerequisites and run tests with Scipy.
